headline: CVS Health Bets On Health100 To Unite AI And Consumer Care
summary: CVS Health (NYSE:CVS) has launched Health100, an AI powered digital health platform, through a new subsidiary. The platform is being developed in major partnership with Google Cloud to connect consumers, providers, payers, and pharmacies. The announcement marks CVS Health's move to build an AI native consumer engagement offering across its healthcare assets. For investors watching CVS Health at a share price of $77.92, Health100 sits on top of an established healthcare and pharmacy...

headline: CVS launches Health100 AI platform with Google Cloud partnership
summary: New health-tech unit will use Google Cloud AI tools to deliver personalized healthcare engagement across providers, insurers and pharmacies.

headline: Can AI Replace Humans for Market Research?

headline: U.S. payrolls unexpectedly fell by 92,000 in February; unemployment rate rises to 4.4%
summary: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase 50,000 in February while the unemployment rate held steady at 4.3%.
